Package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model

Class EndpointStatus

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbAudit
gov.cdc.izgateway.model.AbstractEndpointStatus
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model.EndpointStatus
All Implemented Interfaces:
gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DbAudit, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbEntity, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IEndpoint, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IEndpointStatus, Serializable
public class EndpointStatus extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.AbstractEndpointStatus implements gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbEntity, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IEndpoint, Serializable, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IEndpointStatus
This class reports on the status of a destination at a given point in time.
See Also:
